---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem in the public repo docs, examples, or tooling notes
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Affected Area

- docs
- examples
- tools
- data
- evidence

## What You Expected

Describe the expected behavior or wording.

## What You Saw Instead

Describe the actual problem.

## Evidence

Add links, file paths, screenshots, or short excerpts if relevant.

## Notes

Include any context that helps narrow the issue.
